insight: Transaction alert spam from bulk sells is version dependent: ShopGUI+ /sell handall fires one ShopPostTransactionEvent per inventory stack, and Protect 2.10.6 and earlier broadcast and saved each event separately. Post 2.10.6, Protect merges same player+plugin+type+owner+item transactions within one tick into a single alert and database row, and drops failed ShopGUI+ transactions. Interim mute: Transaction_Log.Broadcast: false in settings.yml.

In Protect 2.10.6 and earlier, BlueShop and ChestShop adminshop transactions were never logged at all (an internal error fired on every such event), so do not diagnose those reports via the usual Enabled/restart flow. The same versions logged ChestShop and SignShop trades as one row per stack with amount=1 and the full total price duplicated on every row, inflating prices in old logs. Both fixed with the transaction merging change after 2.10.6.
